title: Lightning Lotad [Remastered]
description:
This is a recreation of the 1.6.4 mod, "Lightning Lotad", brought to Minecraft 1.20.1
This mod adds new tools & weapons as well as new materials and blocks!
body:
**This mod recreates our original mod, Lightning Lotad. The original mod was created in 2014 for Forge 1.6.4. Since then, the game has changed enough for a full redo. I rebuilt this mod from the ground up using our original assets and fixing bugs from the original mod.**

**Heres what this mod adds:**

New Mob!
  - Pig Lotad: A Lotad pig


Derposity Weapons & Tools
 - Derposity Sword
  - Right clicking with this sword spawns Pig Lotads
 - Derposity Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, & Hoe


Dane's Sword
 - Right clicking with this sword spawns Pigs


Ruby Weapons & Tools
 - Ruby Sword
 - Ruby Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, & Hoe


Emerald Weapons & Tools
 - Emerald Sword
 - Emerald Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, & Hoe


Armor
 - Emerald Chestplate has the Luck III Potion Effect
 - Ruby Helmet has the Regeneration Potion Effect
 - Derposity Helmet has Night Vision Potion Effect
 - Derposity Chestplate has Water Breathing Potion Effect


Battleaxes
 - Wooden Battleaxe
 - Stone Battleaxe
 - Iron Battleaxe
 - Golden Battleaxe
 - Diamond Battleaxe
 - Netherite Battleaxe
 - Emerald Battleaxe
 - Ruby Battleaxe
 - Derposity Battleaxe


New Blocks
 - Ruby Ore & Block
 - Derposity Ore & Block
 - Derposity Stone & Cobblestone


New Items
 - Derposity Stick
 - Purple Derposity Stick
 - Ruby
 - Refined Ruby
 - Dane's Gem
 - Derposity Gem
